name: ClickUp
description: ClickUp task management integration for tasks, lists, and workspaces

fields.name: api_token
fields.label: Personal API Token
fields.help: Get from ClickUp → Settings → Apps → Personal API Token
pre_prompt: 3. Click 'Create New' in API Tokens section

fields.name: team_id
fields.label: Workspace ID
fields.help: Your ClickUp workspace/team ID (numeric). Can be found in API docs or team settings

fields.name: list_id
fields.label: Default List ID
fields.help: ID of the list where new tasks will be created by default

fields.name: branch_pattern
fields.label: Branch name pattern
fields.help: Template for git branch names created from tasks

fields.name: issue_language
fields.label: Language for AI-generated content
fields.help: Language for AI-generated task titles and descriptions

post_install: To view workspaces and lists, run: rg clickup workspaces
To view available lists in a space: rg clickup lists
Your tasks are ready to be managed with: rg clickup issues
